name: Proton Mail
description: End-to-end encrypted email service by Proton AG, based in Geneva, offering zero-access encryption and open-source clients.

years.notes: Original ProtonMail padlock-and-envelope mark used from the 2014 launch through the May 2022 Proton rebrand. Colorized to brand violet #333366.
Post-rebrand Proton Mail envelope icon introduced May 2022. Maskable safe-area background rect stripped per svg.md §1.7.
